_comment: Next.js 16 App Router rules. Loaded when frameworks.*.frontend is 'nextjs'.

rules.message: next/config (serverRuntimeConfig/publicRuntimeConfig) removed in Next.js 16. Use environment variables directly.
getServerSideProps/getStaticProps/getInitialProps are pages directory patterns. Use Server Components with async/await in App Router.
next/head is deprecated in App Router. Use the Metadata API (export const metadata) or generateMetadata().
next/router is the pages directory router. Use next/navigation (useRouter, usePathname, useSearchParams) in App Router.
next/legacy/image removed in Next.js 16. Use next/image directly.
Pages, layouts, and loading files MUST be server components — never add 'use client'. Extract interactive parts into a client component in components/ and import it.
Client hooks (useState/useEffect/useReducer/useRef) in a server component file. Extract into a client component with 'use client' in components/.
Browser API (window/document/localStorage/navigator) used — ensure this is inside a 'use client' component and behind useEffect or typeof window check.
Next.js 16 renamed middleware.ts to proxy.ts. Rename this file to proxy.ts and export function proxy() instead.
Secret value in NEXT_PUBLIC_ env var — this is exposed to the browser. Only use NEXT_PUBLIC_ for non-sensitive values. Secrets go in server-only env vars.
